templates.title: Content Idea Sprint
templates.description: Sinh nhanh cac goc noi dung theo khan gia, nen tang va muc tieu.

variables.label: Chu de
variables.placeholder: Vi du: AI cho chu shop online

variables.label: Khan gia
variables.placeholder: Vi du: nguoi ban hang moi bat dau

templates.prompt: Ban la content strategist. Hay tao 12 y tuong noi dung ve {{topic}} cho {{audience}} tren {{platform}} voi muc tieu {{goal}}. Moi y tuong gom: tieu de ngan, hook 1 cau, insight khan gia, dinh dang de san xuat, CTA va muc do kho 1-5.

exampleInput.topic: AI giup viet caption ban hang

templates.title: Prompt Refiner
templates.description: Bien mot prompt tho thanh prompt ro vai tro, ngu canh, rang buoc va format.

variables.label: Prompt tho
variables.placeholder: Dan prompt hien tai vao day

variables.label: Rang buoc
variables.placeholder: Tone, do dai, ngon ngu, dieu can tranh

templates.outputFormat: 3 prompt hoan chinh kem ghi chu khi dung

exampleInput.draftPrompt: Viet caption cho san pham moi

templates.title: Landing Page Copy Pack
templates.description: Tao bo copy landing page day du cho san pham hoac dich vu.

variables.label: Offer
variables.placeholder: Vi du: khoa hoc AI cho freelancer

variables.label: Noi dau khach hang
variables.placeholder: Van de lon nhat khach dang gap

variables.label: Bang chung
variables.placeholder: Case study, so lieu, kinh nghiem

templates.prompt: Ban la conversion copywriter. Viet copy landing page cho {{offer}}. Khach hang dang dau o: {{customerPain}}. Bang chung hien co: {{proof}}. Tao cac phan: hero headline, subheadline, 5 loi ich, 3 objection answers, offer stack, FAQ 6 cau va CTA chinh/phu.

exampleInput.customerPain: mat khach vi phan hoi cham tren Facebook
exampleInput.proof: da setup cho 20 spa nho, giam 40% thoi gian tra loi

templates.title: Explain Like A Coach
templates.description: Giai thich mot chu de kho bang vi du, bai tap va cau hoi kiem tra.
templates.prompt: Hay dong vai learning coach va giai thich {{concept}} cho nguoi hoc trinh do {{level}}. Dung cau truc: dinh nghia ngan, vi du doi thuong, loi sai thuong gap, bai tap 10 phut, 5 cau hoi tu kiem tra va dap an.

templates.title: Code Review Assistant
templates.description: Kiem tra code theo bug, maintainability, bao mat va test gap.

variables.label: Code
variables.placeholder: Dan code hoac diff can review

variables.label: Ngu canh
variables.placeholder: Muc tieu thay doi, framework, constraint

templates.outputFormat: Findings truoc, sau do test gaps

exampleInput.context: JS utility tinh tong gio hang
